name: Ready to Go Honey Bran Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium mixing bowl, combine 1/2 cup bran, boiling water and honey. Set aside.
2. In a large mixing bowl, beat sugar, shortening, baking soda and salt with an electric mixer until blended.
3. Beat in egg. Stir in 1/2 of the flour.
4. Add bran mixture and remaining 1 cup bran. Mix well.
5. Line egg-n-muffin cups with paper baking cups.
6. Fill each cup about half full with batter.
7. Microwave the muffins at high for 2 1/2 to 4 1/2 minutes, or until they are no longer moist on top. Repeat with remaining batter.
8. Yield: Approximately 2 dozen muffins.
